Define custom prompts for the assistant.
Determines if your site is optimized for: Determines if your site is optimized for small or large sites. In environments with a lot of groups it can be very slow or impossible to build a list all groups. This option tunes the user interface and behaviour for this case by allowing you to search for groups instead of listing all of them.

Determines if your site is optimized for small or large sites. In environments with a lot of users it can be very slow or impossible to build a list all users. This option tunes the user interface and behaviour for this case by allowing you to search for users instead of listing all of them.
Do not send the email to the user that d: Do not send the email to the user that did the action.
Email address to contact about this even: Email address to contact about this event.
Enter a comment that describes the chang: Enter a comment that describes the changes you made.
Enter a user name, usually something lik: Enter a user name, usually something like 'jsmith'. No spaces or special characters. Usernames and passwords are case sensitive, make sure the caps lock key is not enabled. This is the name used to log in.
Enter full name, for example, John Smith: Enter full name, for example, John Smith.
Find items related to the selected items: Find items related to the selected items

If enabled, the site is multilingual.
